title: S&P 500 heads for worst quarter since 2022 as Iran war, rate worries rattle Wall Street
description: The broad U.S. equity index is closing out its worst quarter in four years, reflecting an investor retreat driven in ​large part by inflation fears, uncertainty over the Iran war and concerns about the economic impact of artificial intelligence.
